mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_recommendation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY match_score DESC
SELECT * FROM job_recommendation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY match_score DESC LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT * FROM job_recommendation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(created_at) = #{date} ORDER BY match_score DESC
SELECT * FROM job_recommendation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_recommendation (user_id, job_id, match_score, reason, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, #{matchScore}, #{reason}, NOW())

INSERT INTO job_recommendation (user_id, job_id, match_score, reason, created_at) VALUES
(#{rec.userId}, #{rec.jobId}, #{rec.matchScore}, #{rec.reason}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job_recommendation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
